7:
With great satisfaction, Mujih informs you that the second installment in her series is on its way to <Emphasis>The Raven</Emphasis>. She praises you for your part in Basyle's recent successes, and bids you keep up your efforts.

※The next botanist quest will be available from Mujih Mewrilah upon reaching level 58.
